metadata.title: But We Knew
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - And If We Too, Had Left?
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Blessed Be; Our Anguish, Eternal

07 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - Time Will Forget Us; You Will Not
